summary: v0.6.24 release candidate is ready for hosted review and protected-main integration.
findings: Frozen plan coverage, 82-group release prepublish, coverage suites, release-critical tests, version parity, incident clearance, generated artifacts, and package smoke all pass on the candidate branch.
residual_risks: Publication remains deferred until the exact merged main SHA completes the Publish to npm workflow and external registry parity is read back.
